## Checks

- [ ] `npm ci`
- [ ] `just lint`

## Contract notes

- [ ] JSON schema changes are documented alongside the schema.
- [ ] Coordinate conversion remains at the Blender boundary.
- [ ] Any new physics field uses explicit Box3D-compatible units.
- [ ] Evidence and deliberate non-claims are stated in the relevant receipt/doc.
